name: Adikteev
description: Mobile app re-engagement and retargeting DSP helping app marketers increase user lifetime value with personalized ads.

seo.title: Adikteev — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Adikteev: Mobile app re-engagement and retargeting DSP helping app marketers increase user lifetime value with personalized ads.

when_to_use: Re-engaging churned users with predictive churn DSP targeting
Personalized dynamic retargeting ads for e-commerce apps
Increasing day-7 retention via early lifecycle re-engagement campaigns
Segmenting lapsed users by LTV potential for retargeting

pros: Specialized purely in re-engagement at scale
cons: Not useful for cold user acquisition
Requires existing large user base to work
Minimum spend locks out smaller apps
review.verdict: Best-in-class retargeting DSP if you already have users worth bringing back, useless otherwise.
review.best_for: Established apps with 1M+ MAU chasing incremental revenue from lapsed users.
review.not_for: Early-stage apps without retargetable audiences or reliable LTV data.

lock_in.reason: DSP retargeting data bound to vendor ad stack

transparency.reason: Usage-based but rates negotiated per advertiser
